ListItem.Para: PA system operates normally and can be clearly heard throughout the cabin during flight.
PA system is used to alert passengers when associated passenger lighted information sign is inoperative.

OperationProcedure.Para: PA system is used to notify passengers when seat belts must be fastened.

ListItem.Para: Passenger seats from which a passenger lighted information sign is not readily legible are blocked and placarded DO NOT OCCUPY.
Lavatory with passenger lighted information sign not readily legible has entrance door locked closed and placarded, INOPERATIVE - DO NOT ENTER.

Note.Para: These conditions are not intended to prohibit lavatory use or inspections by crew members.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: If required, block and placard associated seats or lavatory (AMM DDG 33-24-01)

Note.Para: In tests conducted at Boeing for the FAA, a sign was considered readily legible if enough of the sign could be seen to identify it. For example, FASTEN SEAT B would be considered readily legible.

ListItem.Para: Install tapes or ropes of conspicuous contrasting colors to block access to unusable seats prior to boarding of passengers.
Place conspicuous signs or placards in appropriate locations to indicate seats which are not to be occupied by passengers or flight attendants.
For an associated lavatory, close and lock the lavatory door.
Alternate procedures are established and used.
Regular passengers may not be carried, however remaining crew or engineers that require repositioning due to the unserviceability may travel.

Where the PA is inoperative, any persons carried on the flight must be briefed that seat belts are to be worn at all times unless they receive specific advice from a flight crew member during the flight that they are permitted to unfasten seat belts.
In order to facilitate communication from the flight deck, any additional persons are to be seated in the forward three rows.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided operations procedure is used.

OperationProcedure.Para: PA system is used to notify passengers when seat belts must be fastened.
